1. package subagent
2. 
3. import (
4. 	"context"
5. 	"fmt"
6. 	"sync"
7. 	"time"
8. 
9. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/config"
10. )
11. 
12. // AgentEventType identifies the kind of event recorded during sub-agent execution.
13. type AgentEventType int
14. 
15. const (
16. 	AgentEventText       AgentEventType = iota // LLM text output
17. 	AgentEventToolCall                         // tool invocation started
18. 	AgentEventToolResult                       // tool execution result
19. 	AgentEventError                            // error encountered
20. )
21. 
22. // AgentEvent is a single recorded event from a sub-agent's execution.
23. type AgentEvent struct {
24. 	Type     AgentEventType
25. 	Text     string // AgentEventText / AgentEventError
26. 	ToolName string // AgentEventToolCall / AgentEventToolResult
27. 	ToolArgs string // AgentEventToolCall
28. 	Result   string // AgentEventToolResult
29. 	IsError  bool   // AgentEventToolResult / AgentEventError
30. }
31. 
32. const maxAgentEvents = 200
33. 
34. // Status represents the lifecycle state of a sub-agent.
35. type Status string
36. 
37. const (
38. 	StatusPending   Status = "pending"
39. 	StatusRunning   Status = "running"
40. 	StatusCompleted Status = "completed"
41. 	StatusFailed    Status = "failed"
42. 	StatusCancelled Status = "cancelled"
43. )
44. 
45. // AgentMessage represents a message sent to a sub-agent.
46. type AgentMessage struct {
47. 	From    string
48. 	Message string
49. 	Summary string
50. }
51. 
52. // SubAgent represents a spawned child agent.
53. type SubAgent struct {
54. 	ID              string
55. 	Task            string
56. 	DisplayTask     string
57. 	Tools           []string
58. 	ToolCallCount   int
59. 	Status          Status
60. 	CurrentPhase    string
61. 	CurrentTool     string
62. 	CurrentArgs     string
63. 	ProgressSummary string
64. 	Result          string
65. 	Error           error
66. 	CreatedAt       time.Time
67. 	StartedAt       time.Time
68. 	EndedAt         time.Time
69. 	Mailbox         chan AgentMessage
70. 	events          []AgentEvent
71. 	cancel          context.CancelFunc
72. 	mu              sync.Mutex
73. }
74. 
75. type Snapshot struct {
76. 	ID              string
77. 	Task            string
78. 	DisplayTask     string
79. 	Tools           []string
80. 	ToolCallCount   int
81. 	Status          Status
82. 	CurrentPhase    string
83. 	CurrentTool     string
84. 	CurrentArgs     string
85. 	ProgressSummary string
86. 	Result          string
87. 	Error           string
88. 	CreatedAt       time.Time
89. 	StartedAt       time.Time
90. 	EndedAt         time.Time
91. 	Events          []AgentEvent
92. }
93. 
94. // RecordEvent appends an event to the sub-agent's event log.
95. // This is the exported version for external callers (e.g., tests).
96. func (s *SubAgent) RecordEvent(ev AgentEvent) {
97. 	s.appendEvent(ev)
98. }
99. 
100. func (s *SubAgent) appendEvent(ev AgentEvent) {
101. 	s.mu.Lock()
102. 	defer s.mu.Unlock()
103. 	if len(s.events) >= maxAgentEvents {
104. 		s.events = s.events[1:]
105. 	}
106. 	s.events = append(s.events, ev)
107. }
108. 
109. // Events returns a copy of the recorded events.
110. func (s *SubAgent) Events() []AgentEvent {
111. 	s.mu.Lock()
112. 	defer s.mu.Unlock()
113. 	out := make([]AgentEvent, len(s.events))
114. 	copy(out, s.events)
115. 	return out
116. }
117. 
118. func (s *SubAgent) IncrementToolCalls() {
119. 	s.mu.Lock()
120. 	defer s.mu.Unlock()
121. 	s.ToolCallCount++
122. }
123. 
124. func (s *SubAgent) setStatus(st Status) {
125. 	s.mu.Lock()
126. 	defer s.mu.Unlock()
127. 	s.Status = st
128. }
129. 
130. func (s *SubAgent) getStatus() Status {
131. 	s.mu.Lock()
132. 	defer s.mu.Unlock()
133. 	return s.Status
134. }
135. 
136. func (s *SubAgent) setActivity(phase, toolName, args string) {
137. 	s.mu.Lock()
138. 	defer s.mu.Unlock()
139. 	s.CurrentPhase = phase
140. 	s.CurrentTool = toolName
141. 	s.CurrentArgs = args
142. }
143. 
144. func (s *SubAgent) setProgressSummary(summary string) {
145. 	s.mu.Lock()
146. 	defer s.mu.Unlock()
147. 	s.ProgressSummary = summary
148. }
149. 
150. func (s *SubAgent) snapshot() Snapshot {
151. 	s.mu.Lock()
152. 	defer s.mu.Unlock()
153. 	snap := Snapshot{
154. 		ID:              s.ID,
155. 		Task:            s.Task,
156. 		DisplayTask:     s.DisplayTask,
157. 		Tools:           append([]string(nil), s.Tools...),
158. 		ToolCallCount:   s.ToolCallCount,
159. 		Status:          s.Status,
160. 		CurrentPhase:    s.CurrentPhase,
161. 		CurrentTool:     s.CurrentTool,
162. 		CurrentArgs:     s.CurrentArgs,
163. 		ProgressSummary: s.ProgressSummary,
164. 		Result:          s.Result,
165. 		CreatedAt:       s.CreatedAt,
166. 		StartedAt:       s.StartedAt,
167. 		EndedAt:         s.EndedAt,
168. 		Events:          append([]AgentEvent(nil), s.events...),
169. 	}
170. 	if s.Error != nil {
171. 		snap.Error = s.Error.Error()
172. 	}
173. 	return snap
174. }
175. 
176. // Manager manages spawning, tracking, and collecting results from sub-agents.
177. type Manager struct {
178. 	agents     map[string]*SubAgent
179. 	mu         sync.Mutex
180. 	sem        chan struct{}
181. 	timeout    time.Duration
182. 	showOutput bool
183. 	onUpdate   func(*SubAgent)
184. 	onComplete func(*SubAgent)
185. 	nextID     int
186. 	// rootCtx is the lifecycle ctx for sub-agents. It is independent of any
187. 	// per-call/per-submit ctx so that sub-agents survive the parent agent
188. 	// turn that spawned them. It is cancelled by Shutdown(). See locks.md S6.
189. 	rootCtx    context.Context
190. 	rootCancel context.CancelFunc
191. }
192. 
193. // NewManager creates a Manager with the given config.
194. func NewManager(cfg config.SubAgentConfig) *Manager {
195. 	max := cfg.MaxConcurrent
196. 	if max <= 0 {
197. 		max = 5
198. 	}
199. 	timeout := cfg.Timeout
200. 	if timeout <= 0 {
201. 		timeout = 30 * time.Minute
202. 	}
203. 	rootCtx, rootCancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
204. 	return &Manager{
205. 		agents:     make(map[string]*SubAgent),
206. 		sem:        make(chan struct{}, max),
207. 		timeout:    timeout,
208. 		showOutput: cfg.ShowOutput,
209. 		rootCtx:    rootCtx,
210. 		rootCancel: rootCancel,
211. 	}
212. }
213. 
214. // RootContext returns the manager's lifecycle context. spawn_agent uses this
215. // (instead of the per-tool-call ctx) so that sub-agents are not cancelled the
216. // moment the parent agent's current turn ends.
217. func (m *Manager) RootContext() context.Context {
218. 	if m.rootCtx == nil {
219. 		return context.Background()
220. 	}
221. 	return m.rootCtx
222. }
223. 
224. // Shutdown cancels every running sub-agent. Call once during app shutdown.
225. func (m *Manager) Shutdown() {
226. 	if m.rootCancel != nil {
227. 		m.rootCancel()
228. 	}
229. }
230. 
231. // Spawn creates a new sub-agent with the given task and returns its ID.
232. func (m *Manager) Spawn(task, displayTask string, tools []string, ctx context.Context) string {
233. 	m.mu.Lock()
234. 	m.nextID++
235. 	id := fmt.Sprintf("sa-%d", m.nextID)
236. 	m.mu.Unlock()
237. 
238. 	sa := &SubAgent{
239. 		ID:           id,
240. 		Task:         task,
241. 		DisplayTask:  displayTask,
242. 		Tools:        tools,
243. 		Status:       StatusPending,
244. 		CurrentPhase: "pending",
245. 		CreatedAt:    time.Now(),
246. 		Mailbox:      make(chan AgentMessage, 16),
247. 	}
248. 
249. 	m.mu.Lock()
250. 	m.agents[id] = sa
251. 	m.mu.Unlock()
252. 
253. 	return id
254. }
255. 
256. // Get retrieves a sub-agent by ID.
257. func (m *Manager) Get(id string) (*SubAgent, bool) {
258. 	m.mu.Lock()
259. 	defer m.mu.Unlock()
260. 	sa, ok := m.agents[id]
261. 	return sa, ok
262. }
263. 
264. // GetOutput returns the result of a completed (or in-progress) sub-agent.
265. // Returns (result, true) if the agent exists, ("", false) otherwise.
266. func (m *Manager) GetTaskOutput(id string) (string, bool) {
267. 	sa, ok := m.Get(id)
268. 	if !ok {
269. 		return "", false
270. 	}
271. 	snap := sa.snapshot()
272. 	if snap.Result != "" {
273. 		return snap.Result, true
274. 	}
275. 	if snap.ProgressSummary != "" {
276. 		return "[in progress] " + snap.ProgressSummary, true
277. 	}
278. 	if snap.Status == "running" {
279. 		return "[running, no output yet]", true
280. 	}
281. 	return "", true
282. }
283. 
284. // List returns all sub-agents.
285. func (m *Manager) List() []*SubAgent {
286. 	m.mu.Lock()
287. 	defer m.mu.Unlock()
288. 	out := make([]*SubAgent, 0, len(m.agents))
289. 	for _, sa := range m.agents {
290. 		out = append(out, sa)
291. 	}
292. 	return out
293. }
294. 
295. func (m *Manager) Snapshot(id string) (Snapshot, bool) {
296. 	m.mu.Lock()
297. 	sa, ok := m.agents[id]
298. 	m.mu.Unlock()
299. 	if !ok {
300. 		return Snapshot{}, false
301. 	}
302. 	return sa.snapshot(), true
303. }
304. 
305. // RunningCount returns the number of currently running agents.
306. func (m *Manager) RunningCount() int {
307. 	m.mu.Lock()
308. 	defer m.mu.Unlock()
309. 	count := 0
310. 	for _, sa := range m.agents {
311. 		if sa.getStatus() == StatusRunning {
312. 			count++
313. 		}
314. 	}
315. 	return count
316. }
317. 
318. // Cancel cancels a running sub-agent.
319. func (m *Manager) Cancel(id string) bool {
320. 	m.mu.Lock()
321. 	sa, ok := m.agents[id]
322. 	m.mu.Unlock()
323. 	if !ok {
324. 		return false
325. 	}
326. 	sa.mu.Lock()
327. 	defer sa.mu.Unlock()
328. 	if sa.Status != StatusRunning {
329. 		return false
330. 	}
331. 	if sa.cancel != nil {
332. 		sa.cancel()
333. 	}
334. 	sa.Status = StatusCancelled
335. 	sa.EndedAt = time.Now()
336. 	return true
337. }
338. 
339. // SetCancel stores the cancel function for a sub-agent.
340. func (m *Manager) SetCancel(id string, cancel context.CancelFunc) {
341. 	m.mu.Lock()
342. 	sa, ok := m.agents[id]
343. 	m.mu.Unlock()
344. 	if ok {
345. 		sa.mu.Lock()
346. 		sa.cancel = cancel
347. 		sa.Status = StatusRunning
348. 		if sa.StartedAt.IsZero() {
349. 			sa.StartedAt = time.Now()
350. 		}
351. 		sa.mu.Unlock()
352. 		m.notifyUpdate(sa)
353. 	}
354. }
355. 
356. // Complete marks a sub-agent as completed or failed.
357. func (m *Manager) Complete(id string, result string, err error) {
358. 	m.mu.Lock()
359. 	sa, ok := m.agents[id]
360. 	onComplete := m.onComplete
361. 	m.mu.Unlock()
362. 	if !ok {
363. 		return
364. 	}
365. 	sa.mu.Lock()
366. 	// Terminal state check: don't overwrite cancelled/completed/failed
367. 	switch sa.Status {
368. 	case StatusCancelled, StatusCompleted, StatusFailed:
369. 		sa.mu.Unlock()
370. 		return
371. 	}
372. 	if err != nil {
373. 		sa.Status = StatusFailed
374. 		sa.CurrentPhase = "failed"
375. 		sa.CurrentTool = ""
376. 		sa.CurrentArgs = ""
377. 		sa.Error = err
378. 	} else {
379. 		sa.Status = StatusCompleted
380. 		sa.CurrentPhase = "completed"
381. 		sa.CurrentTool = ""
382. 		sa.CurrentArgs = ""
383. 	}
384. 	sa.Result = result
385. 	sa.EndedAt = time.Now()
386. 	sa.mu.Unlock()
387. 
388. 	if onComplete != nil {
389. 		onComplete(sa)
390. 	}
391. }
392. 
393. func (m *Manager) UpdateProgress(id, summary string) {
394. 	m.mu.Lock()
395. 	sa, ok := m.agents[id]
396. 	m.mu.Unlock()
397. 	if !ok {
398. 		return
399. 	}
400. 	sa.setProgressSummary(summary)
401. 	m.notifyUpdate(sa)
402. }
403. 
404. func (m *Manager) UpdateActivity(id, phase, toolName, args string) {
405. 	m.mu.Lock()
406. 	sa, ok := m.agents[id]
407. 	m.mu.Unlock()
408. 	if !ok {
409. 		return
410. 	}
411. 	sa.setActivity(phase, toolName, args)
412. 	m.notifyUpdate(sa)
413. }
414. 
415. func (m *Manager) Notify(id string) {
416. 	m.mu.Lock()
417. 	sa, ok := m.agents[id]
418. 	m.mu.Unlock()
419. 	if ok {
420. 		m.notifyUpdate(sa)
421. 	}
422. }
423. 
424. // SetOnComplete sets a callback invoked when any sub-agent completes.
425. func (m *Manager) SetOnComplete(fn func(*SubAgent)) {
426. 	m.mu.Lock()
427. 	m.onComplete = fn
428. 	m.mu.Unlock()
429. }
430. 
431. // SendToAgent sends a message to a specific sub-agent's mailbox.
432. func (m *Manager) SendToAgent(id string, msg AgentMessage) error {
433. 	m.mu.Lock()
434. 	sa, ok := m.agents[id]
435. 	m.mu.Unlock()
436. 	if !ok {
437. 		return fmt.Errorf("sub-agent %q not found", id)
438. 	}
439. 	select {
440. 	case sa.Mailbox <- msg:
441. 		return nil
442. 	default:
443. 		return fmt.Errorf("sub-agent %q mailbox is full", id)
444. 	}
445. }
446. 
447. // Broadcast sends a message to all running sub-agents.
448. func (m *Manager) Broadcast(msg AgentMessage) []string {
449. 	m.mu.Lock()
450. 	defer m.mu.Unlock()
451. 	var sent []string
452. 	for _, sa := range m.agents {
453. 		if sa.getStatus() == StatusRunning {
454. 			select {
455. 			case sa.Mailbox <- msg:
456. 				sent = append(sent, sa.ID)
457. 			default:
458. 				// mailbox full, skip
459. 			}
460. 		}
461. 	}
462. 	return sent
463. }
464. 
465. // SetOnUpdate sets a callback invoked when any sub-agent activity changes.
466. func (m *Manager) SetOnUpdate(fn func(*SubAgent)) {
467. 	m.mu.Lock()
468. 	m.onUpdate = fn
469. 	m.mu.Unlock()
470. }
471. 
472. // AcquireSemaphore blocks until a slot is available for a new sub-agent to run.
473. func (m *Manager) AcquireSemaphore(ctx context.Context) error {
474. 	select {
475. 	case m.sem <- struct{}{}:
476. 		return nil
477. 	case <-ctx.Done():
478. 		return ctx.Err()
479. 	}
480. }
481. 
482. // ReleaseSemaphore releases a slot.
483. func (m *Manager) ReleaseSemaphore() {
484. 	<-m.sem
485. }
486. 
487. // Timeout returns the configured timeout.
488. func (m *Manager) Timeout() time.Duration {
489. 	return m.timeout
490. }
491. 
492. // ShowOutput returns whether to show sub-agent output.
493. func (m *Manager) ShowOutput() bool {
494. 	return m.showOutput
495. }
496. 
497. func (m *Manager) notifyUpdate(sa *SubAgent) {
498. 	m.mu.Lock()
499. 	fn := m.onUpdate
500. 	m.mu.Unlock()
501. 	if fn != nil {
502. 		fn(sa)
503. 	}
504. }
505.
```

</details>

39. // REPL connects the agent to the TUI model.
40. type REPL struct {
41. 	model               Model
42. 	agent               *agent.Agent
43. 	program             *tea.Program
44. 	planSwitcher        *replModeSwitcher
45. 	store               session.Store
46. 	resumeID            string
47. 	mcpMgr              *plugin.MCPManager
48. 	mcpCancel           context.CancelFunc
49. 	commandMgr          *commands.Manager
50. 	skillsChangedHook   func()
51. 	imManager           *im.Manager
52. 	projectMemoryLoader func() (string, []string, error)
53. 	webuiAddr           string // webui listen address, displayed after TUI ready
54. 	knightStartupHint   string // one-time hint shown at startup (e.g. lock conflict)
55. }
56. 
57. // NewREPL creates a new REPL with optional permission policy.
58. func NewREPL(a *agent.Agent, policy permission.PermissionPolicy) *REPL {
59. 	m := NewModel(a, policy)
60. 	return &REPL{
61. 		model: m,
62. 		agent: a,
63. 	}
64. }
65. 
66. // SetSessionStore sets the session persistence store.
67. func (r *REPL) SetSessionStore(s session.Store) {
68. 	r.store = s
69. }
70. 
71. // SetMCPServers passes MCP server info to the TUI model.
72. func (r *REPL) SetMCPServers(servers []MCPInfo) {
73. 	r.model.SetMCPServers(servers)
74. }
75. 
76. // SetA2AHandler passes the A2A task handler so the sidebar can show remote tasks.

78. 	r.model.SetA2AHandler(h)
79. }
80. 
81. func (r *REPL) SetMCPManager(mgr *plugin.MCPManager) {
82. 	r.mcpMgr = mgr
83. 	r.model.SetMCPManager(mgr)
84. }
85. 
86. // SetResumeID sets the session ID to resume.
87. func (r *REPL) SetResumeID(id string) {

89. }
90.

92. func (r *REPL) SetConfig(cfg *config.Config) {

94. }

96. func (r *REPL) SetPluginManager(mgr *plugin.Manager) {

98. }

102. }

107. }

111. }

113. func (r *REPL) SetIMManager(mgr *im.Manager) {
114. 	r.imManager = mgr
115. 	r.model.SetIMManager(mgr)
116. 	if mgr != nil {
117. 		mgr.SetBridge(newTUIIMBridge(func() *tea.Program { return r.program }))
118. 	}
119. }

129. // SetKnightStartupHint sets a one-time hint to show in the chat area at startup.

132. }
133. 
134. // SetWebUIBridge sets the webui event broadcaster for forwarding agent
135. // events to webchat subscribers.
136. func (r *REPL) SetWebUIBridge(b WebUIEventBroadcaster) {
137. 	r.model.webuiBridge = b
138. }
139. 
140. // InjectWebchatMessage sends a webchat user message into the TUI event loop.
141. // The message is handled like a normal user input — if the agent is idle,
142. // it starts a new run; if busy, it queues as a pending interruption.
143. func (r *REPL) InjectWebchatMessage(text string) {
144. 	if r.program != nil {
145. 		r.program.Send(webchatUserMsg{Text: text})
146. 	}
147. }
148. 
149. // SetWebUIReadyAddr stores the webui address to be displayed in the TUI
150. // after startup. The actual program.Send happens in the startup goroutine
151. // alongside logoMsg to ensure the TUI is ready.
152. func (r *REPL) SetWebUIReadyAddr(addr string) {
153. 	r.webuiAddr = addr
154. }
155. 
156. // SetSystemPromptRebuilder sets a callback that rebuilds the full system prompt
157. // when skills or other dynamic parts change.
158. func (r *REPL) SetSystemPromptRebuilder(fn func() string) {
159. 	r.model.SetSystemPromptRebuilder(fn)
160. }
161. 
162. func (r *REPL) SetProjectMemoryFiles(files []string) {
163. 	r.model.SetProjectMemoryFiles(files)
164. }
165. 
166. func (r *REPL) SetProjectMemoryLoader(loader func() (string, []string, error)) {
167. 	r.projectMemoryLoader = loader
168. 	r.model.SetProjectMemoryLoading(loader != nil)
169. }
170. 
171. func (r *REPL) SetAutoMemoryFiles(files []string) {
172. 	r.model.SetAutoMemoryFiles(files)
173. }
174. 
175. // SetCheckpointManager wires the checkpoint manager into the agent and REPL.
176. func (r *REPL) SetCheckpointManager(m *checkpoint.Manager) {
177. 	r.agent.SetCheckpointManager(m)
178. 	r.agent.SetDiffConfirm(func(ctx context.Context, filePath, diffText string) bool {
179. 		return r.requestDiffConfirm(ctx, filePath, diffText)
180. 	})
181. }
182. 
183. // SetSubAgentManager wires the sub-agent manager and registers sub-agent tools.
184. func (r *REPL) SetSubAgentManager(mgr *subagent.Manager, prov provider.Provider, tools *tool.Registry) {
185. 	r.model.SetSubAgentManager(mgr)
186. 
187. 	factory := func(prov provider.Provider, t interface{}, systemPrompt string, maxTurns int) subagent.AgentRunner {
188. 		return agent.NewAgent(prov, t.(*tool.Registry), systemPrompt, maxTurns)
189. 	}
190. 
191. 	tools.Register(tool.SpawnAgentTool{
192. 		Manager:      mgr,
193. 		Provider:     prov,
194. 		Tools:        tools,
195. 		AgentFactory: factory,
196. 	})
197. 	tools.Register(tool.WaitAgentTool{Manager: mgr})
198. 	tools.Register(tool.ListAgentsTool{Manager: mgr})
199. 
200. 	// Notify TUI on live updates and completion.
201. 	mgr.SetOnUpdate(func(sa *subagent.SubAgent) {
202. 		if r.program != nil {
203. 			r.program.Send(subAgentUpdateMsg{})
204. 		}
205. 	})
206. 	mgr.SetOnComplete(func(sa *subagent.SubAgent) {
207. 		if r.program != nil {
208. 			r.program.Send(subAgentUpdateMsg{})
209. 		}
210. 	})
211. }
212. 
213. // SetTaskManager wires the task manager and registers task tools.
214. func (r *REPL) SetTaskManager(mgr *task.Manager, tools *tool.Registry) {
215. 	tools.Register(tool.TaskCreateTool{Manager: mgr})
216. 	tools.Register(tool.TaskGetTool{Manager: mgr})
217. 	tools.Register(tool.TaskListTool{Manager: mgr})
218. 	tools.Register(tool.TaskUpdateTool{Manager: mgr})
219. 	tools.Register(tool.TaskStopTool{Manager: mgr})
220. }
221. 
222. // SetTaskOutputTool registers the task_output tool for reading sub-agent results.
223. func (r *REPL) SetTaskOutputTool(mgr *subagent.Manager, tools *tool.Registry) {
224. 	tools.Register(tool.TaskOutputTool{Provider: mgr})
225. }
226. 
227. // SetCronScheduler wires the cron scheduler and registers cron tools.
228. func (r *REPL) SetCronScheduler(s *cron.Scheduler, tools *tool.Registry) {
229. 	s.SetEnqueue(func(prompt string) {
230. 		if r.program != nil {
231. 			r.program.Send(cronPromptMsg{Prompt: prompt})
232. 		}
233. 	})
234. 	tools.Register(tool.CronCreateTool{Scheduler: s})
235. 	tools.Register(tool.CronDeleteTool{Scheduler: s})
236. 	tools.Register(tool.CronListTool{Scheduler: s})
237. }
238. 
239. // SetPlanModeTools registers plan mode tools with a mode switcher that
240. // updates both the Model's mode and the ConfigPolicy. The switcher
241. // remembers the previous mode so exit_plan_mode can restore it.
242. func (r *REPL) SetPlanModeTools(tools *tool.Registry) {
243. 	switcher := &replModeSwitcher{model: &r.model}
244. 	r.planSwitcher = switcher
245. 	tools.Register(tool.EnterPlanModeTool{Switcher: switcher})
246. 	tools.Register(tool.ExitPlanModeTool{Switcher: switcher, DefaultMode: permission.SupervisedMode})
247. }
248. 
249. // SetConfigTool registers the config tool backed by the current config.
250. func (r *REPL) SetConfigTool(tools *tool.Registry) {
251. 	access := &replConfigAccess{model: &r.model}
252. 	tools.Register(tool.ConfigTool{Access: access})
253. }
254. 
255. // SetSendMessageTool registers the send_message tool for agent communication.
256. func (r *REPL) SetSendMessageTool(mgr *subagent.Manager, tools *tool.Registry) {
257. 	tools.Register(tool.SendMessageTool{Manager: mgr})
258. }
259. 
260. // SetSwarmManager wires the swarm manager and registers swarm tools.
```

</details>

63. // startupInputGateWindow suppresses terminal noise (CSI/OSC responses) that
64. // arrive shortly after program start. During this window, only single
65. // printable characters with no modifiers are passed to textinput; everything
66. // else (multi-char text, modified keys) is dropped as likely terminal garbage.
67. const startupInputGateWindow = 500 * time.Millisecond

1. package tool
2. 
3. import (
4. 	"context"
5. 	"encoding/json"
6. 	"fmt"
7. 
8. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/provider"
9. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/safego"
10. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/subagent"
11. )
12. 
13. // SpawnAgentTool implements the spawn_agent tool.
14. type SpawnAgentTool struct {
15. 	Manager      *subagent.Manager
16. 	Provider     provider.Provider
17. 	Tools        *Registry
18. 	AgentFactory subagent.AgentFactory
19. }
20. 
21. func (t SpawnAgentTool) Name() string { return "spawn_agent" }
22. 
23. func (t SpawnAgentTool) Description() string {
24. 	return "Spawn a sub-agent to work on a task independently. Returns an agent_id. Use wait_agent or list_agents to poll status and retrieve the eventual result."
25. }
26. 
27. func (t SpawnAgentTool) Parameters() json.RawMessage {
28. 	return json.RawMessage(`{
29. 	"type": "object",
30. 	"properties": {
31. 		"task": {
32. 			"type": "string",
33. 			"description": "The task description for the sub-agent"
34. 		},
35. 		"tools": {
36. 			"type": "array",
37. 			"items": {
38. 				"type": "string"
39. 			},
40. 			"description": "Optional list of tool names the sub-agent can use (defaults to all parent tools except sub-agent tools)"
41. 		},
42. 		"context": {
43. 			"type": "string",
44. 			"description": "Optional additional context for the sub-agent"
45. 		},
46. 		"model": {
47. 			"type": "string",
48. 			"enum": [
49. 				"sonnet",
50. 				"opus",
51. 				"haiku"
52. 			],
53. 			"description": "Optional model override for the sub-agent"
54. 		},
55. 		"subagent_type": {
56. 			"type": "string",
57. 			"description": "Optional type of specialized agent (e.g., 'Explore', 'Plan')"
58. 		},
59. 		"description": {
60. 			"type": "string",
61. 			"description": "REQUIRED. Brief activity label shown in the UI. Write in the user's language (e.g. 'Searching for TODO patterns', '检查构建配置'). You MUST always provide this field."
62. 		}
63. 	},
64. 	"required": [
65. 		"task",
66. 		"description"
67. 	]
68. }`)
69. }
70. 
71. func (t SpawnAgentTool) Execute(ctx context.Context, input json.RawMessage) (Result, error) {
72. 	if t.Manager == nil {
73. 		return Result{IsError: true, Content: "spawn_agent: sub-agent manager not available"}, nil
74. 	}
75. 	var args struct {
76. 		Task         string   `json:"task"`
77. 		Tools        []string `json:"tools"`
78. 		Context      string   `json:"context"`
79. 		Model        string   `json:"model"`
80. 		SubagentType string   `json:"subagent_type"`
81. 	}
82. 	if err := json.Unmarshal(input, &args); err != nil {
83. 		return Result{IsError: true, Content: fmt.Sprintf("invalid input: %v", err)}, nil
84. 	}
85. 
86. 	if args.Task == "" {
87. 		return Result{IsError: true, Content: "task is required"}, nil
88. 	}
89. 
90. 	displayTask := args.Task
91. 	if args.Context != "" {
92. 		args.Task = args.Context + "\n\n" + args.Task
93. 	}
94. 
95. 	id := t.Manager.Spawn(args.Task, displayTask, args.Tools, ctx)
96. 
97. 	// Build tool info list for sub-agent
98. 	var allToolInfo []subagent.ToolInfo
99. 	if t.Tools != nil {
100. 		for _, ti := range t.Tools.List() {
101. 			allToolInfo = append(allToolInfo, ti)
102. 		}
103. 	}
104. 
105. 	// Capture for goroutine closure
106. 	tools := t.Tools
107. 
108. 	// Use the manager's lifecycle ctx, NOT the per-tool-call ctx, otherwise
109. 	// the moment the parent agent's current turn ends (defer cancel() on the
110. 	// submit ctx) every spawned sub-agent is cancelled mid-stream and any
111. 	// half-applied tool side effect is left in place. See locks.md S6.
112. 	runCtx := t.Manager.RootContext()
113. 
114. 	// Capture model and subagent_type for the runner config
115. 	model := args.Model
116. 	subagentType := args.SubagentType
117. 
118. 	// Launch the sub-agent in a goroutine
119. 	safego.Go("tool.spawnAgent.subagent", func() {
120. 		subagent.Run(runCtx, subagent.RunnerConfig{
121. 			Provider:     t.Provider,
122. 			AllTools:     allToolInfo,
123. 			Task:         args.Task,
124. 			AllowedTools: args.Tools,
125. 			Manager:      t.Manager,
126. 			SubAgentID:   id,
127. 			AgentFactory: t.AgentFactory,
128. 			Model:        model,
129. 			AgentType:    subagentType,
130. 			BuildToolSet: func(allowedTools []string, _ []subagent.ToolInfo) interface{} {
131. 				subReg := NewRegistry()
132. 				if len(allowedTools) == 0 {
133. 					for _, ti := range allToolInfo {
134. 						name := ti.Name()
135. 						if name != "spawn_agent" && name != "wait_agent" && name != "list_agents" {
136. 							if tl, ok := tools.Get(name); ok {
137. 								subReg.Register(tl)
138. 							}
139. 						}
140. 					}
141. 				} else {
142. 					for _, name := range allowedTools {
143. 						if tl, ok := tools.Get(name); ok {
144. 							subReg.Register(tl)
145. 						}
146. 					}
147. 				}
148. 				return subReg
149. 			},
150. 		})
151. 	})
152. 
153. 	return Result{Content: fmt.Sprintf("Sub-agent spawned with ID: %s\nUse wait_agent or list_agents to monitor progress and retrieve the result.", id)}, nil
154. }
155.
```

</details>

1516. 
1517. 	case cronPromptMsg:
1518. 		sysMsg := m.t("cron.firing")
1519. 		m.chatWriteSystem(nextSystemID(), sysMsg)
1520. 		m.emitIMText(sysMsg)
1521. 		// If agent is idle, submit the cron prompt immediately.
1522. 		// Otherwise queue it for processing after the current run finishes.
1523. 		if !m.loading {
1524. 			return m, m.submitText(msg.Prompt, true)
1525. 		}
1526. 		m.queuePendingSubmissionHidden(msg.Prompt)
1527. 		return m, nil
1528. 
1529. 	case skillsChangedMsg:
1530. 		m.refreshCommands()
1531. 		return m, nil
1532. 
1533. 	case updateCheckResultMsg:
1534. 		m.applyUpdateCheckResult(msg)
1535. 		return m, nil
1536. 
1537. 	case updateCheckTickMsg:
1538. 		return m, tea.Batch(m.checkForUpdateCmd(), m.scheduleUpdateCheckCmd())
1539. 
1540. 	case gitBranchTickMsg:
1541. 		m.refreshCachedGitBranch()
1542. 		return m, tea.Tick(2*time.Second, func(t time.Time) tea.Msg {
1543. 			return gitBranchTickMsg{}
1544. 		})
1545. 
1546. 	case imPanelRefreshMsg:
1547. 		// Continue ticking as long as any IM panel that needs live state is open
1548. 		if m.whatsappPanel != nil {
1549. 			return m, tea.Tick(2*time.Second, func(t time.Time) tea.Msg {
1550. 				return imPanelRefreshMsg{}
1551. 			})
1552. 		}
1553. 		return m, nil
1554. 
1555. 	case updatePrepareResultMsg:
1556. 		return m.handlePreparedUpdate(msg)
1557. 
1558. 	case toolStatusMsg:
1559. 		if m.runCanceled || !m.loading {
1560. 			return m, nil
1561. 		}
1562. 		ts := ToolStatusMsg(msg)
1563. 		m.updateActiveMCPTools(ts)
1564. 		if ts.Running {
1565. 			if !isSubAgentLifecycleTool(ts.ToolName) {
1566. 				m.statusToolCount++
1567. 			}
1568. 			m.chatStartTool(ts)
1569. 			if m.streamBuffer != nil && m.streamBuffer.Len() > 0 {
1570. 				m.renderStreamBuffer(true)
1571. 			}
1572. 			startCmd := m.spinner.Start(firstNonEmpty(ts.Activity, formatToolInline(toolDisplayName(ts), toolDetail(ts))))
1573. 			spinnerCmd = combineCmds(spinnerCmd, startCmd)
1574. 		} else {
1575. 			m.chatFinishTool(ts)
1576. 			ts.Elapsed = m.spinner.Elapsed()
1577. 			m.spinner.Stop()
1578. 			spinnerCmd = combineCmds(spinnerCmd, m.ensureLoadingSpinner(m.statusActivity))
1579. 			// Reset stream prefix so next text block gets ●
1580. 			m.streamPrefixWritten = false
1581. 			// Reset stream buffer position for next text chunk
1582. 		}
1583. 		m.chatListScrollToBottom()
1584. 		return m, spinnerCmd
1585. 
1586. 	case agentToolBatchMsg:
1587. 		// Batched tool events — process all accumulated status + tool updates
1588. 		// in a single Update cycle instead of one message per event.
1589. 		// This prevents event-loop saturation from burst tool call/results.
1590. 		if msg.RunID != m.activeAgentRunID || m.runCanceled || !m.loading {
1591. 			return m, nil
1592. 		}
1593. 		// Apply the last status message (only the latest matters for the status bar).
1594. 		if len(msg.StatusMsgs) > 0 {
1595. 			last := msg.StatusMsgs[len(msg.StatusMsgs)-1]
1596. 			m.statusActivity = last.Activity
1597. 			m.statusToolName = last.ToolName
1598. 			m.statusToolArg = last.ToolArg
1599. 			spinnerCmd = combineCmds(spinnerCmd, m.ensureLoadingSpinner(m.statusActivity))
1600. 		}
1601. 		// Apply all tool status updates sequentially.
1602. 		for _, ts := range msg.ToolMsgs {
1603. 			m.updateActiveMCPTools(ts.ToolStatusMsg)
1604. 			if ts.Running {
1605. 				if !isSubAgentLifecycleTool(ts.ToolName) {
```

1. package subagent
2. 
3. import (
4. 	"context"
5. 	"fmt"
6. 	runtimedebug "runtime/debug"
7. 	"strings"
8. 	"time"
9. 
10. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/debug"
11. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/provider"
12. )
13. 
14. // ToolInfo is the minimal interface needed from a tool for sub-agent registration.
15. type ToolInfo interface {
16. 	Name() string
17. }
18. 
19. // AgentFactory creates an agent with the given provider, tool registry, system prompt, and max turns.
20. // The tools parameter is an opaque value passed through from the caller.
21. type AgentFactory func(prov provider.Provider, tools interface{}, systemPrompt string, maxTurns int) AgentRunner
22. 
23. // AgentRunner is the minimal interface needed from an agent.
24. type AgentRunner interface {
25. 	RunStream(ctx context.Context, prompt string, onEvent func(provider.StreamEvent)) error
26. }
27. 
28. // RunnerConfig holds everything needed to run a sub-agent.
29. type RunnerConfig struct {
30. 	Provider     provider.Provider
31. 	AllTools     []ToolInfo
32. 	Task         string
33. 	AllowedTools []string
34. 	Manager      *Manager
35. 	SubAgentID   string
36. 	AgentFactory AgentFactory
37. 	BuildToolSet func(allowedTools []string, allTools []ToolInfo) interface{} // returns opaque tool set for agent
38. 	Model        string                                                       // optional model override (e.g., "sonnet", "opus", "haiku")
39. 	AgentType    string                                                       // optional agent type hint (e.g., "Explore", "Plan")
40. }
41. 
42. // Run starts the sub-agent in a goroutine, running a complete agentic loop.
43. // The sub-agent gets its own context manager, tool subset, and provider instance.
44. func Run(ctx context.Context, cfg RunnerConfig) {
45. 	// Acquire concurrency slot
46. 	if err := cfg.Manager.AcquireSemaphore(ctx); err != nil {
47. 		cfg.Manager.Complete(cfg.SubAgentID, "", fmt.Errorf("failed to acquire slot: %w", err))
48. 		return
49. 	}
50. 	defer cfg.Manager.ReleaseSemaphore()
51. 
52. 	// Panic recovery: ensures Complete() is always called so Wait() never blocks forever.
53. 	defer func() {
54. 		if r := recover(); r != nil {
55. 			debug.Log("subagent", "panic recovered subagent=%s error=%v stack=%s", cfg.SubAgentID, r, string(runtimedebug.Stack()))
56. 			cfg.Manager.Complete(cfg.SubAgentID, "", fmt.Errorf("sub-agent panic: %v", r))
57. 		}
58. 	}()
59. 
60. 	// Create sub-context with timeout
61. 	timeout := cfg.Manager.Timeout()
62. 	subCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, timeout)
63. 	defer cancel()
64. 	cfg.Manager.SetCancel(cfg.SubAgentID, cancel)
65. 
66. 	sa, _ := cfg.Manager.Get(cfg.SubAgentID)
67. 	if sa != nil {
68. 		sa.setStatus(StatusRunning)
69. 		sa.setActivity("thinking", "", "")
70. 		sa.StartedAt = time.Now()
71. 	}
72. 
73. 	// Build tool subset for this sub-agent
74. 	var toolSet interface{}
75. 	if cfg.BuildToolSet != nil {
76. 		toolSet = cfg.BuildToolSet(cfg.AllowedTools, cfg.AllTools)
77. 	}
78. 
79. 	// Create independent agent with its own context manager
80. 	rolePrefix := "You are a sub-agent."
81. 	if cfg.AgentType != "" {
82. 		rolePrefix = fmt.Sprintf("You are a %s sub-agent.", cfg.AgentType)
83. 	}
84. 	systemPrompt := fmt.Sprintf(
85. 		"%s Complete the following task independently:\n%s\n\nProvide a concise result. Do not spawn further agents.",
86. 		rolePrefix,
87. 		cfg.Task,
88. 	)
89. 	if cfg.AgentFactory == nil {
90. 		cfg.Manager.Complete(cfg.SubAgentID, "", fmt.Errorf("AgentFactory not configured"))
91. 		return
92. 	}
93. 	subAgent := cfg.AgentFactory(cfg.Provider, toolSet, systemPrompt, 0)
94. 
95. 	// Run the agentic loop, capturing output
96. 	var output strings.Builder
97. 	lastToolName := ""
98. 	err := subAgent.RunStream(subCtx, cfg.Task, func(event provider.StreamEvent) {
99. 		switch event.Type {
100. 		case provider.StreamEventText:
101. 			output.WriteString(event.Text)
102. 			if sa, ok := cfg.Manager.Get(cfg.SubAgentID); ok {
103. 				sa.setActivity("writing", "", "")
104. 				sa.appendEvent(AgentEvent{Type: AgentEventText, Text: truncateStr(event.Text, 500)})
105. 			}
106. 			cfg.Manager.Notify(cfg.SubAgentID)
107. 		case provider.StreamEventToolCallDone:
108. 			// Increment tool call count for this subagent
109. 			if sa, ok := cfg.Manager.Get(cfg.SubAgentID); ok {
110. 				sa.IncrementToolCalls()
111. 				sa.setActivity("tool", event.Tool.Name, string(event.Tool.Arguments))
112. 				sa.appendEvent(AgentEvent{
113. 					Type:     AgentEventToolCall,
114. 					ToolName: event.Tool.Name,
115. 					ToolArgs: truncateStr(string(event.Tool.Arguments), 300),
116. 				})
117. 			}
118. 			lastToolName = event.Tool.Name
119. 			cfg.Manager.Notify(cfg.SubAgentID)
120. 		case provider.StreamEventToolResult:
121. 			if summary := subagentToolProgressSummary(lastToolName, event.Result); summary != "" {
122. 				cfg.Manager.UpdateProgress(cfg.SubAgentID, summary)
123. 			} else {
124. 				cfg.Manager.Notify(cfg.SubAgentID)
125. 			}
126. 			if sa, ok := cfg.Manager.Get(cfg.SubAgentID); ok {
127. 				sa.appendEvent(AgentEvent{
128. 					Type:     AgentEventToolResult,
129. 					ToolName: lastToolName,
130. 					Result:   truncateStr(event.Result, 500),
131. 					IsError:  event.IsError,
132. 				})
133. 			}
134. 		case provider.StreamEventError:
135. 			output.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("[error: %v]\n", event.Error))
136. 			if sa, ok := cfg.Manager.Get(cfg.SubAgentID); ok {
137. 				sa.setActivity("failed", "", "")
138. 				sa.appendEvent(AgentEvent{
139. 					Type:    AgentEventError,
140. 					Text:    fmt.Sprintf("%v", event.Error),
141. 					IsError: true,
142. 				})
143. 			}
144. 			cfg.Manager.Notify(cfg.SubAgentID)
145. 		}
146. 	})
147. 
148. 	result := output.String()
149. 	if err != nil {
150. 		if subCtx.Err() == context.DeadlineExceeded {
151. 			cfg.Manager.Complete(cfg.SubAgentID, result, fmt.Errorf("sub-agent timed out after %v", timeout))
152. 		} else if subCtx.Err() == context.Canceled {
153. 			cfg.Manager.Complete(cfg.SubAgentID, result, fmt.Errorf("sub-agent cancelled"))
154. 		} else {
155. 			cfg.Manager.Complete(cfg.SubAgentID, result, err)
156. 		}
157. 	} else {
158. 		cfg.Manager.Complete(cfg.SubAgentID, result, nil)
159. 	}
160. }
161. 
162. // Wait blocks until the sub-agent with the given ID finishes, returning its result.
163. func Wait(ctx context.Context, mgr *Manager, id string) (string, error) {
164. 	sa, ok := mgr.Get(id)
165. 	if !ok {
166. 		return "", fmt.Errorf("sub-agent %s not found", id)
167. 	}
168. 
169. 	ticker := time.NewTicker(100 * time.Millisecond)
170. 	defer ticker.Stop()
171. 
172. 	for {
173. 		sa.mu.Lock()
174. 		status := sa.Status
175. 		result := sa.Result
176. 		err := sa.Error
177. 		sa.mu.Unlock()
178. 
179. 		switch status {
180. 		case StatusCompleted:
181. 			return result, nil
182. 		case StatusFailed, StatusCancelled:
183. 			return result, err
184. 		}
185. 
186. 		select {
187. 		case <-ticker.C:
188. 			continue
189. 		case <-ctx.Done():
190. 			return "", ctx.Err()
191. 		}
192. 	}
193. }
194. 
195. func WaitForSnapshot(ctx context.Context, mgr *Manager, id string, wait time.Duration) (Snapshot, error) {
196. 	sa, ok := mgr.Get(id)
197. 	if !ok {
198. 		return Snapshot{}, fmt.Errorf("sub-agent %s not found", id)
199. 	}
200. 
201. 	if wait <= 0 {
202. 		return sa.snapshot(), nil
203. 	}
204. 
205. 	timer := time.NewTimer(wait)
206. 	defer timer.Stop()
207. 	ticker := time.NewTicker(100 * time.Millisecond)
208. 	defer ticker.Stop()
209. 
210. 	for {
211. 		snap := sa.snapshot()
212. 		switch snap.Status {
213. 		case StatusCompleted, StatusFailed, StatusCancelled:
214. 			return snap, nil
215. 		}
216. 
217. 		select {
218. 		case <-ticker.C:
219. 			continue
220. 		case <-timer.C:
221. 			return sa.snapshot(), nil
222. 		case <-ctx.Done():
223. 			return Snapshot{}, ctx.Err()
224. 		}
225. 	}
226. }
227. 
228. func subagentToolProgressSummary(toolName, result string) string {
229. 	switch toolName {
230. 	case "start_command", "read_command_output", "wait_command", "stop_command", "write_command_input", "list_commands":
231. 		return compactProgressSummary(result)
232. 	default:
233. 		return ""
234. 	}
235. }
236. 
237. func compactProgressSummary(result string) string {
238. 	lines := strings.Split(result, "\n")
239. 	parts := make([]string, 0, 3)
240. 	for _, line := range lines {
241. 		line = strings.TrimSpace(line)
242. 		switch {
243. 		case strings.HasPrefix(line, "Job ID: "):
244. 			parts = append(parts, line)
245. 		case strings.HasPrefix(line, "Status: "):
246. 			parts = append(parts, line)
247. 		case strings.HasPrefix(line, "Total lines: "):
248. 			parts = append(parts, line)
249. 		}
250. 	}
251. 	if len(parts) == 0 {
252. 		return ""
253. 	}
254. 	return strings.Join(parts, " • ")
255. }
256. 
257. func truncateStr(s string, maxLen int) string {
258. 	if len(s) <= maxLen {
259. 		return s
260. 	}
261. 	return s[:maxLen] + "..."
262. }
263.
```

```
1. package swarm
2. 
3. import (
4. 	"context"
5. 	"fmt"
6. 	"sync"
7. 	"time"
8. 
9. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/config"
10. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/debug"
11. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/provider"
12. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/safego"
13. 	"github.com/topcheer/ggcode/internal/task"
14. )
15. 
16. // AgentFactory creates an agent with the given provider, tool set, system prompt, and max turns.
17. type AgentFactory func(prov provider.Provider, tools interface{}, systemPrompt string, maxTurns int) AgentRunner
18. 
19. // AgentRunner is the minimal interface a teammate agent must satisfy.
20. type AgentRunner interface {
21. 	RunStream(ctx context.Context, prompt string, onEvent func(provider.StreamEvent)) error
22. }
23. 
24. // ToolBuilder constructs a tool set for a teammate based on allowed tool names.
25. type ToolBuilder func(allowedTools []string) interface{}
26. 
27. // Manager manages swarm teams: creation, teammate spawning, lifecycle.
28. type Manager struct {
29. 	teams    map[string]*Team
30. 	provider provider.Provider
31. 	cfg      config.SwarmConfig
32. 
33. 	agentFactory AgentFactory
34. 	toolBuilder  ToolBuilder
35. 	onUpdate     func(Event)
36. 
37. 	// results stores the most recent task output per teammate (key=teammateID).
38. 	// Written on teammate_idle events, cleared on teammate shutdown.
39. 	results map[string]string
40. 
41. 	rootCtx    context.Context
42. 	rootCancel context.CancelFunc
43. 	mu         sync.Mutex
44. 	nextTeamID int
45. }
46. 
47. // NewManager creates a swarm Manager.
48. func NewManager(cfg config.SwarmConfig, prov provider.Provider, factory AgentFactory, builder ToolBuilder) *Manager {
49. 	if cfg.MaxTeammatesPerTeam <= 0 {
50. 		cfg.MaxTeammatesPerTeam = 8
51. 	}
52. 	// TeammateTimeout defaults to 0 (no timeout). Set in config to enforce a deadline.
53. 	if cfg.InboxSize <= 0 {
54. 		cfg.InboxSize = 32
55. 	}
56. 	if cfg.PollInterval <= 0 {
57. 		cfg.PollInterval = 1 * time.Second
58. 	}
59. 	rootCtx, rootCancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
60. 	return &Manager{
61. 		teams:        make(map[string]*Team),
62. 		provider:     prov,
63. 		cfg:          cfg,
64. 		agentFactory: factory,
65. 		toolBuilder:  builder,
66. 		results:      make(map[string]string),
67. 		rootCtx:      rootCtx,
68. 		rootCancel:   rootCancel,
69. 	}
70. }
71. 
72. // RootContext returns the manager's lifecycle context.
73. func (m *Manager) RootContext() context.Context {
74. 	if m.rootCtx == nil {
75. 		return context.Background()
76. 	}
77. 	return m.rootCtx
78. }
79. 
80. // Shutdown cancels all running teammates and stops the manager.
81. func (m *Manager) Shutdown() {
82. 	m.mu.Lock()
83. 	defer m.mu.Unlock()
84. 	for _, team := range m.teams {
85. 		team.mu.Lock()
86. 		for _, tm := range team.Teammates {
87. 			if tm.cancel != nil {
88. 				tm.cancel()
89. 			}
90. 			tm.setStatus(TeammateShuttingDown)
91. 		}
92. 		team.mu.Unlock()
93. 	}
94. 	if m.rootCancel != nil {
95. 		m.rootCancel()
96. 	}
97. }
98. 
99. // CreateTeam creates a new team with the given name and returns its snapshot.
100. func (m *Manager) CreateTeam(name, leaderID string) TeamSnapshot {
101. 	m.mu.Lock()
102. 	m.nextTeamID++
103. 	id := fmt.Sprintf("team-%d", m.nextTeamID)
104. 	m.mu.Unlock()
105. 
106. 	team := &Team{
107. 		ID:        id,
108. 		Name:      name,
109. 		LeaderID:  leaderID,
110. 		Teammates: make(map[string]*Teammate),
111. 		Tasks:     nil, // lazily created when first task is added
112. 		CreatedAt: time.Now(),
113. 	}
114. 
115. 	m.mu.Lock()
116. 	m.teams[id] = team
117. 	m.mu.Unlock()
118. 
119. 	m.emit(Event{Type: "team_created", TeamID: id, Timestamp: time.Now()})
120. 	return team.snapshot()
121. }
122. 
123. // DeleteTeam shuts down all teammates and removes the team.
124. func (m *Manager) DeleteTeam(teamID string) error {
125. 	m.mu.Lock()
126. 	team, ok := m.teams[teamID]
127. 	if !ok {
128. 		m.mu.Unlock()
129. 		return fmt.Errorf("team %q not found", teamID)
130. 	}
131. 
132. 	// Shutdown all teammates before removing from map so goroutines
133. 	// that hold a reference to the team can drain gracefully.
134. 	team.mu.Lock()
135. 	for _, tm := range team.Teammates {
136. 		if tm.cancel != nil {
137. 			tm.cancel()
138. 		}
139. 		tm.setStatus(TeammateShuttingDown)
140. 	}
141. 	team.mu.Unlock()
142. 
143. 	delete(m.teams, teamID)
144. 	m.mu.Unlock()
145. 
146. 	m.emit(Event{Type: "team_deleted", TeamID: teamID, Timestamp: time.Now()})
147. 	return nil
148. }
149. 
150. // GetTeam returns a snapshot of the team if it exists.
151. func (m *Manager) GetTeam(id string) (TeamSnapshot, bool) {
152. 	m.mu.Lock()
153. 	team, ok := m.teams[id]
154. 	m.mu.Unlock()
155. 	if !ok {
156. 		return TeamSnapshot{}, false
157. 	}
158. 	return team.snapshot(), true
159. }
160. 
161. // ListTeams returns snapshots of all teams.
162. func (m *Manager) ListTeams() []TeamSnapshot {
163. 	m.mu.Lock()
164. 	defer m.mu.Unlock()
165. 	out := make([]TeamSnapshot, 0, len(m.teams))
166. 	for _, t := range m.teams {
167. 		out = append(out, t.snapshot())
168. 	}
169. 	return out
170. }
171. 
172. // SpawnTeammate creates a new teammate in the given team and starts its idle loop.
173. func (m *Manager) SpawnTeammate(teamID, name, color string, allowedTools []string) (TeammateSnapshot, error) {
174. 	m.mu.Lock()
175. 	team, ok := m.teams[teamID]
176. 	if !ok {
177. 		m.mu.Unlock()
178. 		return TeammateSnapshot{}, fmt.Errorf("team %q not found", teamID)
179. 	}
180. 	// Generate teammate ID while holding m.mu to avoid TOCTOU with concurrent spawns.
181. 	m.nextTeamID++
182. 	tmID := fmt.Sprintf("tm-%d", m.nextTeamID)
183. 	m.mu.Unlock()
184. 
185. 	// Hold team.mu for both the max check and the insert to close the TOCTOU window.
186. 	team.mu.Lock()
187. 	if len(team.Teammates) >= m.cfg.MaxTeammatesPerTeam {
188. 		team.mu.Unlock()
189. 		return TeammateSnapshot{}, fmt.Errorf("team %q already has max %d teammates", teamID, m.cfg.MaxTeammatesPerTeam)
190. 	}
191. 
192. 	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(m.rootCtx)
193. 
194. 	tm := &Teammate{
195. 		ID:        tmID,
196. 		Name:      name,
197. 		Color:     color,
198. 		Status:    TeammateIdle,
199. 		Inbox:     make(chan MailMessage, m.cfg.InboxSize),
200. 		CreatedAt: time.Now(),
201. 		ctx:       ctx,
202. 		cancel:    cancel,
203. 	}
204. 
205. 	team.Teammates[tmID] = tm
206. 	team.mu.Unlock()
207. 
208. 	// Build tool set for this teammate
209. 	var toolSet interface{}
210. 	if m.toolBuilder != nil {
211. 		toolSet = m.toolBuilder(allowedTools)
212. 	}
213. 
214. 	// Create independent agent for this teammate
215. 	systemPrompt := buildTeammateSystemPrompt(name, team.Name)
216. 	var agent AgentRunner
217. 	if m.agentFactory != nil {
218. 		agent = m.agentFactory(m.provider, toolSet, systemPrompt, 0)
219. 	}
220. 
221. 	// Start idle loop in a goroutine
222. 	safego.Go("swarm.teammateLoop", func() {
223. 		runTeammateLoop(ctx, tm, team, agent, m, m.emit, m.cfg.TeammateTimeout)
224. 	})
225. 
226. 	m.emit(Event{
227. 		Type:         "teammate_spawned",
228. 		TeamID:       teamID,
229. 		TeammateID:   tmID,
230. 		TeammateName: name,
231. 		Timestamp:    time.Now(),
232. 	})
233. 
234. 	return tm.snapshot(), nil
235. }
236. 
237. // ShutdownTeammate stops a specific teammate.
238. func (m *Manager) ShutdownTeammate(teamID, tmID string) error {
239. 	m.mu.Lock()
240. 	team, ok := m.teams[teamID]
```

260. // SetSwarmManager wires the swarm manager and registers swarm tools.
261. func (r *REPL) SetSwarmManager(mgr *swarm.Manager, tools *tool.Registry) {
262. 	r.model.swarmMgr = mgr
263. 
264. 	tools.Register(tool.TeamCreateTool{Manager: mgr})
265. 	tools.Register(tool.TeamDeleteTool{Manager: mgr})
266. 	tools.Register(tool.TeammateSpawnTool{Manager: mgr})
267. 	tools.Register(tool.TeammateListTool{Manager: mgr})
268. 	tools.Register(tool.TeammateShutdownTool{Manager: mgr})
269. 	tools.Register(tool.TeammateResultsTool{Manager: mgr})
270. 	tools.Register(tool.SwarmTaskCreateTool{Manager: mgr})
271. 	tools.Register(tool.SwarmTaskListTool{Manager: mgr})
272. 	tools.Register(tool.SwarmTaskClaimTool{Manager: mgr})
273. 	tools.Register(tool.SwarmTaskCompleteTool{Manager: mgr})
274. 
275. 	// Re-register send_message with SwarmMgr so it can route to swarm teammates.
276. 	tools.Unregister("send_message")
277. 	tools.Register(tool.SendMessageTool{Manager: r.model.subAgentMgr, SwarmMgr: mgr})
278. 
279. 	// Notify TUI on swarm state changes.
280. 	mgr.SetOnUpdate(func(ev swarm.Event) {
281. 		if r.program != nil {
282. 			r.program.Send(subAgentUpdateMsg{}) // reuse existing update message
283. 		}
284. 	})
285. }
286. 
287. // replModeSwitcher implements tool.ModeSwitcher by delegating to the TUI Model.
288. type replModeSwitcher struct {
289. 	model        *Model
290. 	program      *tea.Program
291. 	previousMode permission.PermissionMode
292. }
293. 
294. func (s *replModeSwitcher) SetMode(mode permission.PermissionMode) {
295. 	// ConfigPolicy.SetMode is thread-safe (has its own mutex)
296. 	if cp, ok := s.model.policy.(*permission.ConfigPolicy); ok {
297. 		cp.SetMode(mode)
298. 	}
299. 	// Update Model.mode via program.Send for thread safety
300. 	if s.program != nil {
301. 		s.program.Send(modeChangeMsg{Mode: mode})
302. 	}
303. }
304. 
305. // RememberMode saves the current mode as "previous" and returns what was saved.
306. // This is called by enter_plan_mode to remember the mode before switching.
307. func (s *replModeSwitcher) RememberMode(currentMode permission.PermissionMode) permission.PermissionMode {
308. 	// Read the actual current mode from ConfigPolicy (thread-safe, always up-to-date)
309. 	// rather than s.model.mode which may be stale (Bubble Tea copies the model).
310. 	actualCurrent := currentMode // fallback to the argument
311. 	if cp, ok := s.model.policy.(*permission.ConfigPolicy); ok {
312. 		actualCurrent = cp.CurrentMode()
313. 	}
314. 	s.previousMode = actualCurrent
315. 	return actualCurrent
316. }
317. 
318. // RestoreMode returns the remembered mode, or the given fallback.
319. func (s *replModeSwitcher) RestoreMode(fallback permission.PermissionMode) permission.PermissionMode {
320. 	if s.previousMode != permission.SupervisedMode && s.previousMode != permission.PlanMode {
321. 		return s.previousMode
322. 	}
323. 	return fallback
324. }
325. 
326. // modeChangeMsg is sent to update the Model's mode from a goroutine.
327. type modeChangeMsg struct {
328. 	Mode permission.PermissionMode
329. }
330. 
331. // replConfigAccess implements tool.ConfigAccess backed by the TUI Model's config.
332. type replConfigAccess struct {
333. 	model *Model
334. }
335. 
336. func (a *replConfigAccess) Get(key string) (string, bool) {
337. 	if a.model.config == nil {
338. 		return "", false
339. 	}
340. 	switch key {
341. 	case "vendor":
342. 		return a.model.config.Vendor, true
343. 	case "endpoint":
344. 		return a.model.config.Endpoint, true
345. 	case "model":
346. 		return a.model.config.Model, true
347. 	case "language":
348. 		return a.model.config.Language, true
349. 	case "max_iterations":
350. 		return fmt.Sprintf("%d", a.model.config.MaxIterations), true
351. 	case "default_mode":
352. 		return a.model.config.DefaultMode, true
353. 	default:
354. 		return "", false
355. 	}
356. }
357. 
358. func (a *replConfigAccess) Set(key, value string) error {
359. 	// V1: read-only config tool; writing is not yet supported
360. 	return fmt.Errorf("setting %q is not supported in V1 (use /config command)", key)
```

</details>

27. 	mutedTextColor    = compat.AdaptiveColor{Light: lipgloss.Color("240"), Dark: lipgloss.Color("248")}

30. func (m Model) View() tea.View {
31. 	if m.quitting {
32. 		return tea.NewView("")
33. 	}
34. 	if m.fileBrowser != nil {
35. 		return tea.NewView(m.renderFileBrowser())
36. 	}
37. 	if m.previewPanel != nil {
38. 		return tea.NewView(m.renderPreviewPanel())
39. 	}
40. 	header := ""
41. 	if m.topHeaderEnabled() {
42. 		header = m.renderHeader()
43. 	}
44. 	startupBanner := m.renderStartupBanner()
45. 	actionPanel := m.renderContextPanel()
46. 	statusBar := m.renderStatusBar()
47. 	deviceBanner := m.renderDeviceCodeBanner()
48. 	composer := m.renderComposerPanel()
49. 
50. 	availableHeight := m.viewHeight() - lipgloss.Height(header) - lipgloss.Height(startupBanner) - lipgloss.Height(composer)
51. 	if actionPanel != "" {
52. 		availableHeight -= lipgloss.Height(actionPanel)
53. 	}
54. 	if statusBar != "" {
55. 		availableHeight -= lipgloss.Height(statusBar)
56. 	}
57. 	if deviceBanner != "" {
58. 		availableHeight -= lipgloss.Height(deviceBanner)
59. 	}
60. 	if availableHeight < 8 {
61. 		availableHeight = 8
62. 	}
63. 
64. 	debug.Log("layout", "vh=%d h=%d s=%d c=%d a=%d sb=%d d=%d",
65. 		m.viewHeight(),
66. 		lipgloss.Height(header), lipgloss.Height(startupBanner), lipgloss.Height(composer),
67. 		lipgloss.Height(actionPanel), lipgloss.Height(statusBar), lipgloss.Height(deviceBanner))
68. 	debug.Log("layout", "avail=%d", availableHeight)
69. 
70. 	conversation := m.renderConversationPanel(availableHeight)
71. 
72. 	sections := make([]string, 0, 7)
73. 	if header != "" {
74. 		sections = append(sections, header)
75. 	}
76. 	if startupBanner != "" {
77. 		sections = append(sections, startupBanner)
78. 	}
79. 	sections = append(sections, conversation)
80. 	if deviceBanner != "" {
81. 		sections = append(sections, deviceBanner)
82. 	}
83. 	if actionPanel != "" {
84. 		sections = append(sections, actionPanel)
85. 	}
86. 	if statusBar != "" {
87. 		sections = append(sections, statusBar)
88. 	}
89. 	sections = append(sections, composer)
90. 	left := lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, sections...)
91. 	right := m.renderAuxColumn()
92. 	var content string
93. 	if right == "" {
94. 		content = left
95. 	} else {
96. 		content = lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top, left, " ", right)
97. 	}
98. 
99. 	// Cache view snapshot for streaming goroutine (thread-safe via pointer)
100. 	if m.streamViewState != nil {
101. 		m.streamViewState.setSnapshot(content)
102. 	}
103. 	v := tea.NewView(content)
104. 	v.AltScreen = true
105. 	v.MouseMode = tea.MouseModeCellMotion
106. 	return v
107. }
108. 
109. func (m Model) conversationInnerWidth() int {
110. 	width := m.mainColumnWidth() - 4
111. 	if width < 1 {
112. 		width = 1
113. 	}
114. 	return width
115. }
116. 
117. func conversationInnerHeight(panelHeight int) int {
118. 	innerHeight := panelHeight - 2
119. 	if innerHeight < 3 {
120. 		innerHeight = 3
121. 	}
122. 	return innerHeight
123. }
124. 
125. func (m Model) conversationPanelHeight() int {
126. 	header := ""
127. 	if m.topHeaderEnabled() {
128. 		header = m.renderHeader()
129. 	}
130. 	startupBanner := m.renderStartupBanner()
131. 	actionPanel := m.renderContextPanel()
132. 	statusBar := m.renderStatusBar()
133. 	deviceBanner := m.renderDeviceCodeBanner()
134. 	composer := m.renderComposerPanel()
135. 
136. 	availableHeight := m.viewHeight() - lipgloss.Height(header) - lipgloss.Height(startupBanner) - lipgloss.Height(composer)
137. 	if actionPanel != "" {
138. 		availableHeight -= lipgloss.Height(actionPanel)
139. 	}
140. 	if statusBar != "" {
141. 		availableHeight -= lipgloss.Height(statusBar)
142. 	}
143. 	if deviceBanner != "" {
144. 		availableHeight -= lipgloss.Height(deviceBanner)

154. func (m Model) renderHeader() string {
155. 	logoWidth := 44
156. 	if m.viewWidth() >= 120 {
157. 		logoWidth = 48
158. 	}
159. 	logoCard := lipgloss.NewStyle().
160. 		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
161. 		BorderForeground(lipgloss.Color("12")).
162. 		Padding(1, 1, 0, 1).
163. 		Render(renderHeaderLogo(logoWidth, m.t("header.terminal_native")))
164. 
165. 	vendor, endpoint, model := m.currentSelection()
166. 	sessionLine := m.t("label.session") + " " + m.t("session.ephemeral")
167. 	if m.session != nil && m.session.ID != "" {
168. 		sessionLine = fmt.Sprintf("%s %s", m.t("label.session"), truncateString(m.session.ID, 18))
169. 	}
170. 	agentLine := fmt.Sprintf("%s  %s", m.t("label.agents"), m.t("agents.idle"))
171. 
172. 	metaCard := lipgloss.NewStyle().
173. 		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
174. 		BorderForeground(chromeBorderColor).
175. 		Padding(0, 1).
176. 		Render(strings.Join([]string{
177. 			m.styles.title.Render("ggcode"),
178. 			lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(mutedTextColor).Render(m.t("workspace.tagline")),
179. 			"",
180. 			fmt.Sprintf("%s   %s", m.t("label.vendor"), vendor),
181. 			fmt.Sprintf("%s %s", m.t("label.endpoint"), endpoint),
182. 			fmt.Sprintf("%s   %s", m.t("label.model"), model),
183. 			m.t("label.mode") + "    " + m.renderModeBadge(),
184. 			agentLine,
185. 			sessionLine,
186. 		}, "\n"))
187. 
188. 	if m.viewWidth() >= 90 {
189. 		return lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top, logoCard, " ", metaCard)
190. 	}
191. 	return lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, logoCard, metaCard)
192. }
193. 
194. func (m Model) renderStartupBanner() string {
195. 	if !m.startupBannerVisible {
196. 		return ""
197. 	}
198. 	return m.renderContextBox(m.t("panel.startup"), m.t("startup.banner"), lipgloss.Color("11"))
199. }
200. 
201. func (m Model) renderSidebar() string {
202. 	if tracker := m.renderSidebarTaskTracker(); tracker != "" {
203. 		return tracker
204. 	}
205. 	vendor, _, model := m.currentSelection()
206. 
207. 	body := strings.Join([]string{
208. 		"",
209. 		renderSidebarLogo(m.sidebarWidth()-4, sidebarHomepageURL),
210. 		"",
211. 		m.styles.title.Render("ggcode"),
212. 		m.renderSidebarDetailRow(m.t("label.model"), vendor+"/"+model, m.sidebarWidth()-4),
213. 		m.renderSidebarDetailRow(m.t("label.branch"), firstNonEmpty(m.sidebarGitBranch(), "-"), m.sidebarWidth()-4),
214. 		m.renderSidebarDetailRow(m.t("label.skills"), fmt.Sprintf("%d", m.loadedSkillCount()), m.sidebarWidth()-4),
215. 		"",
216. 		m.renderSidebarModeSection(),
217. 		m.renderSidebarUpdateSection(),
218. 		"",
219. 		m.renderSidebarIMSection(),
220. 		"",
221. 		m.renderSidebarMCPSection(),
222. 		"",
223. 		m.renderSidebarA2ASection(),
224. 	}, "\n")
225. 
226. 	return lipgloss.NewStyle().
227. 		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
228. 		BorderForeground(chromeBorderColor).
229. 		Padding(0, 1).
230. 		Width(m.boxInnerWidth(m.sidebarWidth())).
231. 		Render(body)
232. }
233. 
234. func (m Model) renderSidebarModeSection() string {
235. 	width := max(12, m.sidebarWidth()-4)
236. 	rows := []string{
237. 		m.renderSidebarSectionTitle(m.t("panel.mode_policy")),
238. 		m.renderSidebarDetailRow(m.t("label.approval_policy"), m.t(sidebarModeApprovalKey(m.mode)), width),
239. 		m.renderSidebarDetailRow(m.t("label.tool_policy"), m.t(sidebarModeToolsKey(m.mode)), width),
240. 		m.renderSidebarDetailRow(m.t("label.agent_policy"), m.t(sidebarModeAgentKey(m.mode)), width),
241. 	}
242. 	return strings.Join(rows, "\n")
243. }
244. 
245. func (m Model) renderSidebarContextSection() string {
246. 	width := max(12, m.sidebarWidth()-4)
247. 	rows := []string{m.renderSidebarSectionTitle(m.t("panel.context"))}
248. 	stats, ok := m.sidebarContextStats()
249. 	if !ok {
250. 		rows = append(rows, truncateString(m.t("context.unavailable"), width))
251. 		return strings.Join(rows, "\n")
252. 	}
253. 
254. 	rows = append(rows,
255. 		m.renderSidebarDetailRow(m.t("label.window"), humanizeTokenCount(stats.maxTokens), width),
256. 		m.renderSidebarDetailRow(m.t("label.usage"), fmt.Sprintf("%d%%", stats.usagePercent), width),
257. 		m.renderSidebarDetailRow(m.t("label.compact"), fmt.Sprintf("%d%% %s", stats.remainingPercent, m.t("context.until_compact")), width),
258. 	)
259. 	return strings.Join(rows, "\n")
260. }

911. func (m Model) renderConversationPanel(panelHeight int) string {
912. 	innerW := m.conversationInnerWidth()
913. 	innerH := conversationInnerHeight(panelHeight)
914. 
915. 	debug.Log("layout", "panel ph=%d iw=%d ih=%d n=%d",
916. 		panelHeight, innerW, innerH, m.chatList.Len())
917. 
918. 	if m.chatList != nil {
919. 		m.chatList.SetSize(innerW, innerH)
920. 	} else {
921. 		m.chatList = chat.NewList(innerW, innerH)
922. 	}
923. 
924. 	var content string
925. 	if m.chatList.Len() == 0 {
926. 		var sb strings.Builder
927. 		sb.WriteString(m.styles.assistant.Render(m.t("empty.ask")))
928. 		sb.WriteString("\n")
929. 		sb.WriteString(m.styles.prompt.Render(m.t("empty.tips")))
930. 		sb.WriteString("\n\n")
931. 		content = sb.String()
932. 	} else {
933. 		content = m.chatList.Render()
934. 	}
935. 
936. 	contentLines := lipgloss.Height(content)
937. 	if contentLines > innerH {
938. 		debug.Log("layout", "OVERFLOW: contentLines=%d > innerH=%d panelH=%d items=%d",
939. 			contentLines, innerH, panelHeight, m.chatList.Len())
940. 	}
941. 
942. 	width := m.boxInnerWidth(m.mainColumnWidth())
943. 	return lipgloss.NewStyle().
944. 		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
945. 		BorderForeground(lipgloss.Color("208")).
946. 		Padding(0, 1).
947. 		Width(width).
948. 		Height(panelHeight).
949. 		MaxHeight(panelHeight).
950. 		Render(content)
951. }
952. 
953. func (m Model) renderApprovalOptions(options []approvalOption, cursor int) string {
954. 	var rows []string
955. 	for i, opt := range options {
956. 		label := fmt.Sprintf("%s (%s)", opt.label, opt.shortcut)
957. 		if i == cursor {
958. 			rows = append(rows, m.styles.approvalCursor.Render(" ❯ "+label))
959. 			continue
960. 		}
961. 		rows = append(rows, m.styles.approvalDim.Render("   "+label))
962. 	}
963. 	return strings.Join(rows, "\n")
964. }
965. 
966. func (m Model) renderLanguageOptions(options []languageOption, cursor int) string {
967. 	var rows []string
968. 	for i, opt := range options {
969. 		label := fmt.Sprintf("%s (%s)", opt.label, opt.shortcut)
970. 		if i == cursor {
971. 			rows = append(rows, m.styles.approvalCursor.Render(" ❯ "+label))
972. 			continue
973. 		}
974. 		rows = append(rows, m.styles.approvalDim.Render("   "+label))
975. 	}
976. 	return strings.Join(rows, "\n")
977. }
978. 
979. func (m Model) renderAutoComplete() string {
980. 	if len(m.autoCompleteItems) == 0 {
981. 		return ""
982. 	}
983. 
984. 	maxVisible := 8
985. 	start := 0
986. 	if len(m.autoCompleteItems) > maxVisible {
987. 		start = m.autoCompleteIndex
988. 		if start >= len(m.autoCompleteItems)-maxVisible/2 {
989. 			start = len(m.autoCompleteItems) - maxVisible
990. 		}
991. 		if start < 0 {
992. 			start = 0
993. 		}
994. 	}
995. 	end := start + maxVisible
996. 	if end > len(m.autoCompleteItems) {
997. 		end = len(m.autoCompleteItems)
998. 	}
999. 
1000. 	items := m.autoCompleteItems[start:end]
1001. 	maxWidth := 0
1002. 	for _, item := range items {
1003. 		label := item
1004. 		if m.autoCompleteKind == "mention" {
1005. 			if strings.HasSuffix(item, "/") {
1006. 				label = "📁 " + item
1007. 			} else {
1008. 				label = "📄 " + item
1009. 			}
1010. 		}
1011. 		if len(label) > maxWidth {
1012. 			maxWidth = len(label)
1013. 		}
1014. 	}
1015. 
1016. 	title := m.t("panel.commands")
1017. 	if m.autoCompleteKind == "mention" {
1018. 		title = m.t("panel.files")
1019. 	}
1020. 	var rows []string
1021. 	for i, item := range items {
1022. 		realIdx := start + i
1023. 		selected := realIdx == m.autoCompleteIndex
1024. 
1025. 		label := item
1026. 		desc := ""
1027. 		if m.autoCompleteKind == "mention" {
1028. 			if strings.HasSuffix(item, "/") {
1029. 				label = "📁 " + item
1030. 				desc = m.t("label.directory")
1031. 			} else {
1032. 				label = "📄 " + item
1033. 				desc = m.t("label.file")
1034. 			}
1035. 		} else if _, ok := SlashCommandDescriptions[item]; ok {
1036. 			desc = localizeSlashDescription(m.currentLanguage(), item)
1037. 		} else if cmdName := strings.TrimPrefix(item, "/"); cmdName != item {
1038. 			if cmd, ok := m.customCmds[cmdName]; ok {
1039. 				desc = cmd.Description
1040. 			}
1041. 		}
1042. 
1043. 		row := fmt.Sprintf(" %-*s", maxWidth, label)
1044. 		if m.autoCompleteKind == "mention" {
1045. 			row = fmt.Sprintf(" %d. %-*s", realIdx+1, maxWidth, label)
1046. 		}
1047. 		if selected {
1048. 			row = lipgloss.NewStyle().
1049. 				Foreground(lipgloss.Color("226")).
1050. 				Background(lipgloss.Color("236")).
1051. 				Render(row)
1052. 		}
1053. 		if desc != "" {
1054. 			row += " " + lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("8")).Render(desc)
1055. 		}
1056. 		rows = append(rows, row)
1057. 	}
1058. 
1059. 	hint := " " + m.t("hint.autocomplete")
1060. 	if m.autoCompleteKind == "mention" {
1061. 		hint = " " + m.t("hint.mention")
1062. 	}
1063. 	rows = append(rows, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("8")).Render(hint))
1064. 	return m.renderContextBox(title, strings.Join(rows, "\n"), lipgloss.Color("12"))
1065. }
1066. 
1067. func (m Model) renderStatusBar() string {
1068. 	if !m.loading {
1069. 		return ""
1070. 	}
1071. 
1072. 	var sb strings.Builder
1073. 
1074. 	activity := m.statusActivity
1075. 	if activity == "" {
1076. 		if m.activeTodo != nil {
1077. 			activity = localizeTodoFocus(m.currentLanguage(), m.activeTodo.Content)
1078. 		} else {
1079. 			activity = m.t("status.thinking")
1080. 		}
1081. 	}
1082. 
1083. 	// Truncate activity to 30 rendered characters for status bar
1084. 	if lipgloss.Width(activity) > 30 {
1085. 		runes := []rune(activity)
1086. 		for i := len(runes); i > 0; i-- {
1087. 			if lipgloss.Width(string(runes[:i])) <= 29 {
1088. 				activity = string(runes[:i]) + "…"
1089. 				break
1090. 			}
1091. 		}
1092. 	}
1093. 
1094. 	spinnerChar := spinnerFrameGlyph(m.spinner.CurrentFrame())
1095. 
1096. 	line1 := fmt.Sprintf(" %s %s", spinnerChar, activity)
1097. 	if count := m.pendingSubmissionCount(); count > 0 {
1098. 		line1 += fmt.Sprintf(" │ 📨 %s", m.t("queued.count", count))
1099. 	}
1100. 	sb.WriteString(m.styles.statusBar.Render(line1))
1101. 
1102. 	if m.activeTodo != nil || m.statusToolCount > 0 || m.statusToolName != "" {
1103. 		sb.WriteString("\n ")
1104. 		if m.activeTodo != nil {
1105. 			sb.WriteString("🎯 ")
```

1273. func (m Model) renderIMPairingPanel() string {
1274. 	challenge := m.pendingPairingChallenge()
1275. 	if challenge == nil {
1276. 		return ""
1277. 	}
1278. 	platformName := platformDisplayName(challenge.Platform)
1279. 	title := fmt.Sprintf("%s pairing required", platformName)
1280. 	bodyText := fmt.Sprintf("A %s channel is requesting to bind this workspace. Ask the user to enter the 4-digit code shown below in %s.", platformName, platformName)
1281. 	channelLabel := "request channel"
1282. 	boundLabel := "currently bound"
1283. 	codeLabel := "pairing code"
1284. 	hint := fmt.Sprintf("Esc reject • the correct code in %s will complete binding automatically", platformName)
1285. 	if m.currentLanguage() == LangZhCN {
1286. 		cnName := platformCNName(challenge.Platform)
1287. 		title = fmt.Sprintf("%s 绑定验证", cnName)
1288. 		bodyText = fmt.Sprintf("有一个 %s 渠道正在请求绑定当前工作区。请让用户在 %s 中输入下方 4 位绑定码。", cnName, cnName)
1289. 		channelLabel = "请求渠道"
1290. 		boundLabel = "当前绑定"
1291. 		codeLabel = "绑定码"
1292. 		hint = fmt.Sprintf("Esc 拒绝 • %s 中输入正确绑定码后会自动完成绑定", cnName)
1293. 	}
1294. 	if challenge.Kind == im.PairingKindRebind {
1295. 		if m.currentLanguage() == LangZhCN {
1296. 			cnName := platformCNName(challenge.Platform)
1297. 			title = fmt.Sprintf("%s 重新绑定验证", cnName)
1298. 			bodyText = fmt.Sprintf("当前 bot 已经绑定到其他渠道。新渠道在 %s 中输入下方 4 位绑定码后，将解绑旧渠道并切换到当前渠道。", cnName)
1299. 		} else {
1300. 			title = fmt.Sprintf("%s rebind requested", platformName)
1301. 			bodyText = fmt.Sprintf("This bot is already bound to another channel. Entering the 4-digit code below in %s will unbind the old channel and switch to the new channel.", platformName)
1302. 		}
1303. 	}
1304. 
1305. 	codeDigits := strings.Join(strings.Split(challenge.Code, ""), "   ")
1306. 	codeStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
1307. 		Bold(true).
1308. 		Foreground(lipgloss.Color("230")).
1309. 		Background(lipgloss.Color("57")).
1310. 		Padding(1, 3).
1311. 		Margin(1, 0).
1312. 		Render(codeDigits)
1313. 
1314. 	lines := []string{bodyText, ""}
1315. 	lines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(" %s   %s", channelLabel, firstNonEmpty(strings.TrimSpace(challenge.ChannelID), "-")))
1316. 	if challenge.ExistingBinding != nil && strings.TrimSpace(challenge.ExistingBinding.ChannelID) != "" {
1317. 		lines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(" %s   %s", boundLabel, challenge.ExistingBinding.ChannelID))
1318. 	}
1319. 	lines = append(lines,
1320. 		"",
1321. 		lipgloss.NewStyle().Bold(true).Render(codeLabel),
1322. 		codeStyle,
1323. 		lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("8")).Render(hint),
1324. 	)
1325. 	return m.renderContextBox(title, strings.Join(lines, "\n"), lipgloss.Color("11"))
```

1407. func (m Model) renderComposerPanel() string {
1408. 	accent := m.modeColor()
1409. 	hints := []string{
1410. 		m.t("hint.mode") + " " + m.renderModeBadge(),
1411. 		m.t("hint.enter_send"),
1412. 		m.t("hint.help"),
1413. 	}
1414. 	if !m.autoCompleteActive {
1415. 		hints = append(hints, m.t("hint.shift_tab_mode"))
1416. 	}
1417. 	if m.loading {
1418. 		hints = append(hints, m.t("hint.ctrlc_cancel"))
1419. 	} else {
1420. 		hints = append(hints, m.t("hint.ctrlc_exit"))
1421. 	}
1422. 	if count := m.pendingSubmissionCount(); count > 0 {
1423. 		hints = append(hints, m.t("queued.count", count))
1424. 	}
1425. 	if m.pendingImage != nil {
1426. 		hints = append(hints, m.t("hint.image_attached"))
1427. 	}
1428. 	// Stream status: show platform-resolution@fps when streaming
1429. 	if m.streamManager != nil && m.streamManager.IsRunning() {
1430. 		statuses := m.streamManager.Status()
1431. 		if len(statuses) > 0 {
1432. 			ew, eh := m.streamManager.EncoderSize()
1433. 			res := fmt.Sprintf("%dx%d", ew, eh)
1434. 			if ew == 0 || eh == 0 {
1435. 				res = "..."
1436. 			}
1437. 			names := make([]string, 0, len(statuses))
1438. 			for _, s := range statuses {
1439. 				names = append(names, s.Name)
1440. 			}
1441. 			fps := m.streamManager.FPS()
1442. 			if fps == 0 {
1443. 				fps = 15
1444. 			}
1445. 			streamDot := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("196")).Render("\u25cf")
1446. 			hints = append(hints, fmt.Sprintf("%s %s %s@%dfps", streamDot, strings.Join(names, ","), res, fps))
1447. 		}
1448. 	}
1449. 
1450. 	// Show loop timer as last hint when agent is running
1451. 	if m.loading {
1452. 		elapsed := time.Since(m.loopStart).Truncate(time.Second)
1453. 		var timerLabel string
1454. 		if m.currentLanguage() == LangZhCN {
1455. 			timerLabel = "酿造 " + formatDuration(elapsed)
1456. 		} else {
1457. 			timerLabel = "brewing " + formatDuration(elapsed)
1458. 		}
1459. 		hints = append(hints, lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("6")).Render(timerLabel))
1460. 	}
1461. 
1462. 	hintLine := strings.Join(hints, " • ")
1463. 	body := m.renderComposerInput() + "\n" + hintLine
1464. 
1465. 	width := m.boxInnerWidth(m.mainColumnWidth())
1466. 	return lipgloss.NewStyle().
1467. 		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
1468. 		BorderForeground(accent).
1469. 		Padding(0, 1).
1470. 		Width(width).
1471. 		Render(body)
1472. }
1473. 
1474. func (m Model) renderComposerInput() string {
1475. 	v := m.input.View()
1476. 	if m.inputHint != "" && !m.loading {
1477. 		hint := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color("8")).Render(m.inputHint)
1478. 		v += hint
1479. 	}
1480. 	return v
1481. }
1482. 
1483. func (m Model) renderContextBox(title, body string, accent color.Color) string {
1484. 	width := m.boxInnerWidth(m.mainColumnWidth())
1485. 	content := body
1486. 	if strings.TrimSpace(title) != "" {
1487. 		content = lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(accent).Bold(true).Render(" "+title) + "\n" + body
1488. 	}
1489. 	// Add scope indicator if any panel is open
1490. 	scopeLine := ""
1491. 	if m.config != nil && m.config.HasInstanceConfigAttached() && m.isAnyPanelOpen() {
1492. 		scopeLabel := m.configSaveScopeLabel()
1493. 		scopeColor := lipgloss.Color("8") // gray for global
1494. 		if m.configSaveScope == "instance" {
1495. 			scopeColor = lipgloss.Color("14") // cyan for instance
1496. 		}
1497. 		hint := ""
1498. 		if m.configSaveScope == "instance" {
1499. 			if _, err := os.Stat(m.config.InstanceDirPath()); os.IsNotExist(err) {
1500. 				hint = " (new config will be created on save)"
1501. 			}
1502. 		}
1503. 		scopeLine = "\n" + lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(scopeColor).Render(
1504. 			fmt.Sprintf(" Save target: %s%s  [Ctrl+T toggle]", scopeLabel, hint))
1505. 	}
```

</details>

700. 			}
701. 		case "enter":
702. 			// Handle pending auto-run suggestion: Enter confirms harness run (before autocomplete)
703. 			// Handle pending harness review: Enter approves the task
704. 			if m.pendingHarnessReview != nil {
705. 				task := m.pendingHarnessReview
706. 				m.pendingHarnessReview = nil
707. 				m.chatWriteSystem(nextSystemID(), fmt.Sprintf("Approving task %s...", task.ID))
708. 				m.chatListScrollToBottom()
709. 				return m, m.handleHarnessReviewApprove(task.ID)
710. 			}
711. 			// Handle pending harness promote: Enter promotes the task
712. 			if m.pendingHarnessPromote != nil {
713. 				task := m.pendingHarnessPromote
714. 				m.pendingHarnessPromote = nil
715. 				m.chatWriteSystem(nextSystemID(), fmt.Sprintf("Promoting task %s...", task.ID))
716. 				m.chatListScrollToBottom()
717. 				return m, m.handleHarnessPromoteApply(task.ID)
718. 			}
719. 			if m.pendingAutoRun != nil {
720. 				result := m.pendingAutoRun
721. 				text := m.pendingAutoRunText
722. 				m.pendingAutoRun = nil
723. 				m.pendingAutoRunText = ""
724. 				m.chatWriteSystem(nextSystemID(), "Running in harness...")
725. 				m.chatListScrollToBottom()
726. 				return m, m.handleAutoRun(text, result)
727. 			}
728. 			if m.autoCompleteActive && len(m.autoCompleteItems) > 0 {
729. 				return m, m.applyAutoComplete()
730. 			}
731. 			m.resetExitConfirm()
732. 			// Clear stale auto-run suggestion when user submits new text
733. 			if m.pendingAutoRun != nil {
734. 				m.pendingAutoRun = nil
735. 				m.pendingAutoRunText = ""
736. 			}
737. 			if m.pendingHarnessReview != nil {
738. 				m.pendingHarnessReview = nil
739. 			}
740. 			if m.pendingHarnessPromote != nil {
741. 				m.pendingHarnessPromote = nil
742. 			}
743. 			text := strings.TrimSpace(m.input.Value())
744. 			m.input.Reset()
745. 			if text == "" {
746. 				m.chatListScrollToBottom()
747. 				return m, nil
748. 			}
749. 			if m.shellMode {
750. 				m.emitIMLocalUserText("$ " + text)
751. 				if m.loading || m.projectMemoryLoading {
752. 					m.history = append(m.history, "$ "+text)
753. 					m.historyIdx = len(m.history)
754. 					m.queuePendingSubmission(text)
755. 					return m, nil
756. 				}
757. 				return m, m.submitShellCommand(text, true)
758. 			}
759. 			m.emitIMLocalUserText(text)
760. 			if m.loading || m.projectMemoryLoading {
761. 				if shouldExecuteWhileBusy(text) {
762. 					return m, m.submitText(text, true)
763. 				}
764. 				m.history = append(m.history, text)
765. 				m.historyIdx = len(m.history)
766. 				m.queuePendingSubmission(text)
767. 				return m, nil
768. 			}
769. 			return m, m.submitText(text, true)
770. 		case "shift+enter":
771. 			// Shift+Enter inserts newline into textarea.
772. 			// Use InsertRune('\n') instead of manual string splicing + SetValue
773. 			// so that the textarea's internal cursor/row/col state stays correct.
774. 			// SetValue resets the cursor to the end, causing visual glitches.
775. 			m.input.InsertRune('\n')
776. 			m.updateAutoComplete()
777. 			return m, nil
778. 		}
779. 
780. 	case streamMsg:
781. 		if m.runCanceled {
782. 			return m, nil
783. 		}
784. 		m.appendStreamChunk(string(msg))
785. 		return m, combineCmds(spinnerCmd, m.ensureLoadingSpinner(m.statusActivity))
786. 
787. 	case remoteRestartMsg:
788. 		m.quitting = true
789. 		m.restartRequested = true
790. 		return m, tea.Quit
791. 
792. 	case remoteInboundMsg:
793. 		// Track the originating adapter for per-channel echo suppression.
794. 		m.remoteInboundAdapter = msg.Message.Envelope.Adapter
795. 		prompt := buildRemoteInboundPrompt(msg.Message)
796. 
797. 		// Handle IM approval reply: y/a/n for pending tool permission
798. 		if m.pendingApproval != nil {
799. 			text := strings.TrimSpace(prompt)
800. 			if text != "" {
801. 				decision, ok := parseApprovalReply(text)
802. 				if ok {
803. 					toolName := m.pendingApproval.ToolName
804. 					decisionStr := "deny"
805. 					var cmd tea.Cmd
806. 					if decision == permission.Allow && isApprovalAlwaysReply(text) {
807. 						cmd = m.handleApprovalAllowAlways()
808. 						decisionStr = "always"
809. 					} else {
810. 						if decision == permission.Allow {
811. 							decisionStr = "allow"
812. 						}
813. 						cmd = m.handleApproval(decision)
814. 					}
815. 					if msg.Response != nil {
816. 						msg.Response <- nil
817. 					}
818. 					// Send result confirmation back to IM
819. 					if m.approvalNotifiedIM {
820. 						m.emitIMApprovalResult(toolName, decisionStr)
821. 					}
822. 					return m, cmd
823. 				}
824. 			}
825. 		}
826. 
827. 		if m.pendingQuestionnaire != nil {
828. 			if strings.TrimSpace(prompt) == "" {
829. 				if msg.Response != nil {
830. 					msg.Response <- fmt.Errorf("empty remote message")
831. 				}
832. 				return m, nil
833. 			}
834. 			completed, err := m.pendingQuestionnaire.applyRemoteAnswer(prompt, m.currentLanguage())
835. 			if msg.Response != nil {
836. 				msg.Response <- nil
837. 			}
838. 			if err != nil {
839. 				switch m.currentLanguage() {
840. 				case LangZhCN:
841. 					m.emitIMText("没有识别出有效的问卷答案，请直接回复选项编号或文本答案。")
842. 				default:
843. 					m.emitIMText("I couldn't parse that questionnaire answer. Reply with choice numbers or plain text.")
844. 				}
845. 				return m, nil
846. 			}
847. 			if completed {
848. 				return m, m.handleQuestionnaireResult(toolpkg.AskUserStatusSubmitted)
849. 			}
850. 			if nextIdx := m.pendingQuestionnaire.firstUnansweredQuestionIndex(); nextIdx >= 0 {
851. 				q := m.pendingQuestionnaire.request.Questions[nextIdx]
852. 				fallback := m.formatIMAskUserQuestion(m.pendingQuestionnaire.request.Title, q)
853. 				if len(q.Choices) > 0 {
854. 					m.emitIMAskUserInteractive(m.pendingQuestionnaire.request.Title, q, fallback)
855. 				} else {
856. 					m.emitIMAskUser(fallback)
857. 				}
858. 			}
859. 			return m, nil
860. 		}
```

</details>
